description: Frontend IP address of the load balancer.

etag.description: A unique read-only string that changes whenever the resource is updated.

name.description: The name of the resource that is unique within the set of frontend IP configurations used by the load balancer. This name can be used to access the resource.

properties.description: Properties of the load balancer probe.

zones.description: A list of availability zones denoting the IP allocated for the resource needs to come from.

name: FrontendIPConfiguration
